docs.title: Wger - A2A | AG-UI | MCP
docs.text: Version: 0.8.0

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Wger MCP Server + A2A Agent

Wger Workout Manager — exercise database, workout routines, nutrition plans, body measurements, and progress tracking.

This repository is actively maintained - Contributions are welcome!

docs.title: Using as an MCP Server
docs.text: The MCP Server can be run in two modes: stdio (for local testing) or http (for networked access).

docs.title: Environment Variables
docs.text:
• WGER_INSTANCE: The URL of the target service.
  • WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN: The API token or access token.

docs.title: Run in stdio mode (default):
docs.text:
export WGER_INSTANCE="http://localhost:8080"
export WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN="your_token"
wger-mcp --transport "stdio"

docs.title: Run in HTTP mode:
docs.text:
export WGER_INSTANCE="http://localhost:8080"
export WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN="your_token"
wger-mcp --transport "http" --host "0.0.0.0" --port "8000"

docs.title: Run A2A Server
docs.text:
export WGER_INSTANCE="http://localhost:8080"
export WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN="your_token"
wger-agent --provider openai --model-id gpt-4o --api-key sk-...

docs.title: Build
docs.text: docker build -t wger-agent .

docs.title: Run MCP Server
docs.text:
docker run -d \
  --name wger-agent \
  -p 8000:8000 \
  -e TRANSPORT=http \
  -e WGER_INSTANCE="http://your-service:8080" \
  -e WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN="your_token" \
  knucklessg1/wger-agent:latest

docs.title: Deploy with Docker Compose
docs.text:
services:
  wger-agent:
    image: knucklessg1/wger-agent:latest
    environment:
      - HOST=0.0.0.0
      - PORT=8000
      - TRANSPORT=http
      - WGER_INSTANCE=http://your-service:8080
      - WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN=your_token
    ports:
      - 8000:8000

docs.title: Configure mcp.json for AI Integration (e.g. Claude Desktop)
docs.text:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "wger": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": [
        "run",
        "--with",
        "wger-agent",
        "wger-mcp"
      ],
      "env": {
        "WGER_INSTANCE": "http://your-service:8080",
        "WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN": "your_token"
      }
    }
  }
}

docs.title: Install Python Package
docs.text:
python -m pip install wger-agent

uv pip install wger-agent

docs.title: Graph Architecture
docs.text:
This agent uses pydantic-graph orchestration for intelligent routing and optimal context management.

---
title: Wger Agent Graph Agent
---
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> RouterNode: User Query
  RouterNode --> DomainNode: Classified Domain
  RouterNode --> [*]: Low confidence / Error
  DomainNode --> [*]: Domain Result
  • RouterNode: A fast, lightweight LLM (e.g., nvidia/nemotron-3-super) that classifies the user's query into one of the specialized domains.
  • DomainNode: The executor node. For the selected domain, it dynamically sets environment variables to temporarily enable ONLY the tools relevant to that domain, creating a highly focused sub-agent (e.g., gpt-4o) to complete the request. This preserves LLM context and prevents tool hallucination.

docs.title: 1. Standard IO (stdio) Deployment
docs.text:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "wger-agent": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": [
        "run",
        "wger-mcp"
      ],
      "env": {
        "AGENT_DESCRIPTION": "<YOUR_AGENT_DESCRIPTION>",
        "AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT": "<YOUR_AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT>",
        "BODYTOOL": "True",
        "DEFAULT_AGENT_NAME": "<YOUR_DEFAULT_AGENT_NAME>",
        "EXERCISETOOL": "True",
        "NUTRITIONTOOL": "True",
        "ROUTINECONFIGTOOL": "True",
        "ROUTINETOOL": "True",
        "USERTOOL": "True",
        "WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN": "<YOUR_WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN>",
        "WGER_INSTANCE": "<YOUR_WGER_INSTANCE>",
        "WGER_VERIFY": "<YOUR_WGER_VERIFY>",
        "WORKOUTTOOL": "True"
      }
    }
  }
}

docs.title: 2. Streamable HTTP (SSE) Deployment
docs.text:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "wger-agent": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": [
        "run",
        "wger-mcp",
        "--transport",
        "http",
        "--host",
        "0.0.0.0",
        "--port",
        "8000"
      ],
      "env": {
        "AGENT_DESCRIPTION": "<YOUR_AGENT_DESCRIPTION>",
        "AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT": "<YOUR_AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT>",
        "BODYTOOL": "True",
        "DEFAULT_AGENT_NAME": "<YOUR_DEFAULT_AGENT_NAME>",
        "EXERCISETOOL": "True",
        "NUTRITIONTOOL": "True",
        "ROUTINECONFIGTOOL": "True",
        "ROUTINETOOL": "True",
        "USERTOOL": "True",
        "WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN": "<YOUR_WGER_ACCESS_TOKEN>",
        "WGER_INSTANCE": "<YOUR_WGER_INSTANCE>",
        "WGER_VERIFY": "<YOUR_WGER_VERIFY>",
        "WORKOUTTOOL": "True"
      }
    }
  }
}

docs.title: wger-agent — Concept Overview
docs.text: Category: Lifestyle | Ecosystem Role: MCP Server + A2A Agent Built on agent-utilities — the unified AGI Harness.

docs.title: Description
docs.text: Wger Workout Manager — exercise database, workout routines, nutrition plans, body measurements, and progress tracking.

docs.title: Enterprise Readiness
docs.text:
All agents in the ecosystem inherit enterprise-grade infrastructure from agent-utilities:

Feature Status Source JWT/OIDC Authentication ✅ Built-in agent-utilities[auth] — Authlib JWKS + API key middleware OpenTelemetry Instrumentation ✅ Built-in agent-utilities[logfire] — OTLP export, FastAPI auto-instrumentation HashiCorp Vault Integration ✅ Built-in agent-utilities[vault] — secret://, env://, vault:// URI schemes Audit Logging ✅ Built-in Append-only compliance trail with 30+ action types (CONCEPT:OS-5.7) Token Usage Analytics ✅ Built-in 4-bucket tracking with budget alerting (CONCEPT:OS-5.6) Prompt Injection Defense ✅ Built-in 25+ pattern scanner + jailbreak taxonomy (CONCEPT:OS-5.4, OS-5.12) Guardrail Engine ✅ Built-in Input/output interception with block/redact/warn (CONCEPT:OS-5.8) Execution Budget Controls ✅ Built-in Token, cost, duration, and node transition limits (CONCEPT:ORCH-1.3) Multi-Model Routing ✅ Built-in Tier-based + confidence-gated adaptive selection (CONCEPT:ORCH-1.2) Session Concurrency ✅ Built-in Enqueue/reject/interrupt/rollback (CONCEPT:OS-5.3)

docs.title: Concept Registry
docs.text:
This project implements or inherits the following ecosystem concepts:

Concept ID Description Source ECO-4.1 MCP & Universal Skills agent-utilities (inherited)

📖 Full Registry: See agent-utilities/docs/overview.md for the complete 5-Pillar concept index.

docs.title: Architecture
docs.text:
This project follows the standardized agent-package pattern:

wger-agent/
├── wger_agent/        # Source code
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── agent_server.py      # Entry point (create_graph_agent_server)
│   ├── api_client.py        # REST/GraphQL API wrapper
│   └── mcp_server.py        # FastMCP tool definitions
├── tests/                   # Test suite
├── docs/                    # Documentation
├── pyproject.toml           # Package metadata
├── mcp_config.json          # MCP server configuration
├── main_agent.json          # Agent identity & system prompt
└── Dockerfile               # Container deployment

docs.title: stdio Mode
docs.text:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "wger-agent": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": ["run", "--with", "wger-agent", "wger-mcp"],
      "env": {}
    }
  }
}

docs.title: Streamable HTTP Mode
docs.text: wger-mcp --transport streamable-http --port 8001
